dependencies_verified.claim_used: ai-worker process boot at apps/ai-worker/src/ai-worker.ts:127 — RedisMonitoringPublisher started in same try-block as MonitoringFlushService
aiMonitoringRouter at apps/api/src/modules/ai-monitoring/ai-monitoring.router.ts:63 — 5 monitoring methods rewired to call aiMonitoringStore
AIMonitoringService and MonitoringFlushService — DB tier preserved unchanged; store wraps service for fall-through

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api test src/modules/ai-monitoring && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/ai-worker test src/monitoring

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec eslint --max-warnings 0 src/modules/ai-monitoring/ai-monitoring.redis-store.ts src/modules/ai-monitoring/ai-monitoring.router.ts src/modules/ai-monitoring/__tests__/ai-monitoring.redis.unit.test.ts src/modules/ai-monitoring/__tests__/ai-monitoring.redis.crossprocess.test.ts && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/ai-worker exec eslint --max-warnings 0 src/monitoring/redis-monitoring-publisher.ts src/monitoring/__tests__/redis-monitoring-publisher.test.ts src/monitoring/index.ts src/ai-worker.ts

kpi_results.actual: T-I1 byte-equal round-trip MEASURED with REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379. RedisAIMonitoringStore reads publisher-shape Redis writes and returns source='redis' with byte-equal payload. Run timestamp 2026-04-27T20:48:28Z; 5/5 cross-process tests pass.
T-I2 100-GET p95 MEASURED at 2026-04-27T20:48:28Z with real Redis (intelliflow-redis container, 6379). Test asserts p95 < 50 ms; passed.

0 — T-A7 (Zod-poisoned key), T-A7b (non-JSON), T-A8 (v0 schema version), T-I4 (tamper SET garbage), T-I5 (cross-process schema-version isolation) all force fall-through to DB. Store NEVER returns malformed payload.
Store: 98.52 stmts / 92.72 branches / 100 fns / 100 lines. Publisher: 98.63 stmts / 82.40 branches / 95.74 fns / 100 lines. Both files exceed all four thresholds.

evidence_summary.risk_mitigated: R-016 Cache Poisoning (Planned → Mitigated; impact 4→2; score 8→4)
evidence_summary.audit_remediation: Post-attestation 7-finding audit (HIGH×2, MEDIUM×3, LOW×2) all addressed in run-2026-04-27T20-55-00Z. See definition_of_done_items + notes for per-finding evidence.

definition_of_done_items.item: ai-worker publishes tenant-scoped monitoring snapshots to Redis (per-tenant queries — Lens-5 fix)
definition_of_done_items.verified_by: T-W1..T-W7 + Lens-5 per-tenant test (`distinct: ['tenantId']` then per-tenant findMany); 19/19 publisher tests green

definition_of_done_items.item: aiMonitoring router reads Redis-backed metrics (5 endpoints)
definition_of_done_items.verified_by: router.ts handlers rewired; T-A1..T-A5 cache-hit; existing 23/23 router regression tests still green

definition_of_done_items.item: Cache key respects user filters — non-default startTime/endTime/limit/model/metric forces DB read (Lens-1 fix)
definition_of_done_items.verified_by: 9 new filter-bypass tests in ai-monitoring.redis.unit.test.ts (T-Lens-1-* covering each method × each filter); store skips redis.get entirely for filtered requests

definition_of_done_items.item: Cache-poisoning mitigations enforced (key namespacing, schema validation, TTL/versioning)
definition_of_done_items.verified_by: T-A6 (tenant), T-A7 + T-A7b (Zod), T-A8 (v0 invisible to v1), T-I5 (cross-process schema-version isolation against real Redis)

definition_of_done_items.item: Redis outage fallback returns safe empty payloads
definition_of_done_items.verified_by: T-A9 (redis.get throws), T-A11 (cache miss), T-W3 (publisher swallows redis.set throw), T-I3 (real-Redis TTL expiry → DB)

definition_of_done_items.item: Cross-process integration test verifies worker writes are visible to API (Lens-1+7 fix — now imports REAL store)
definition_of_done_items.verified_by: ai-monitoring.redis.crossprocess.test.ts imports RedisAIMonitoringStore from production code, exercises 5 contract tests against real Redis (T-I1 round-trip + T-I2 latency + T-I3 outage + T-I4 tamper + T-I5 schema-version). All 5 pass with REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379.

environment.redis_url_at_run: redis://localhost:6379 (intelliflow-redis container — real Redis, T-I1..T-I5 ran, p95 measured)

findings_addressed.title: Cache key ignores user inputs
findings_addressed.fix: hasFilters() bypass in ai-monitoring.redis-store.ts; 9 filter-bypass unit tests added; cache-eligibility scoped to no-filter requests

findings_addressed.title: Cross-process test never exercised publisher/store
findings_addressed.fix: Rewrote crossprocess test to import real RedisAIMonitoringStore + use __test.redisKey from production code; 5 tests run against real Redis

findings_addressed.title: KPIs marked met:true while skipped
findings_addressed.fix: Re-ran with REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379; cross-process + p95 KPIs now MEASURED, not asserted on skip

findings_addressed.title: Publisher fetched 10000 events globally
findings_addressed.fix: Per-tenant fetch via distinct-tenants probe + per-tenant findMany; new Lens-5 per-tenant test asserts the call pattern

findings_addressed.title: Typecheck was scoped + stdout_hash labels not SHA-256
findings_addressed.fix: Full pnpm --filter typecheck for both packages exit 0; stdout_hash fields now real SHA-256 of captured stdout

findings_addressed.title: Placeholder assertions reintroduced
findings_addressed.fix: expect(true).toBe(true) env-guard removed (suite now uses describe.skipIf cleanly); double-start placeholder replaced with `expect(redis.set).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(5)` — real invariant

findings_addressed.title: as T cast hides string-vs-Date drift
findings_addressed.fix: Casts retained but reduced to two single-boundary points (readOrFallback's `parsed as T` and getDriftMetrics's `merge result as DriftValue`), each with a 7-line doc-block explaining the Zod-runtime safety argument. The Zod schemas (passthrough) cannot structurally satisfy AIMonitoringService's stricter return types, so the cast is unavoidable; honest framing is 'documented + minimised', not 'removed'.

notes: IFC-214 implements ADR-052 (Redis-backed AI Monitoring Live Snapshot Bridge). compliance PASS — R-016 (Cache Poisoning) compliance-check passed: tenant-scoped key namespacing, Zod payload validation on read, schema version prefix, TTL/versioning all present and tested; risk register row 91 updated Planned→Mitigated; ADR-043 status freshened Proposed→Accepted; dependency chains diagram updated. This attestation supersedes the initial run-2026-04-27T00-00-00Z attestation, which was honestly flagged for 7 findings by a post-hoc audit. ALL 7 findings remediated in run-2026-04-27T20-55-00Z; integration tests now run against real Redis (intelliflow-redis container at localhost:6379); all stdout_hash fields are real SHA-256 of captured logs.
